name: VirusTotal
description: Analyze suspicious files and URLs to detect types of malware, and automatically share them with the security community. Tool: https://www.virustotal.com/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #623 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map VirusTotal output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved VirusTotal output file to parse instead of running it live.
